item.title: Avalyn Pharma IPO & Idiopathic Pulmonary Fibrosis
item.description:
• Summary: Avalyn Pharma has filed for an initial public offering to fund Phase 3 clinical trials for inhaled formulations of approved drugs, such as pirfenidone and nintedanib, for idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF), aiming to enhance drug delivery and reduce systemic side effects.
  • MoAs: Pirfenidone modulates TGF-β signaling to reduce fibrosis, while nintedanib inhibits multiple tyrosine kinases (e.g., VEGFR, FGFR, PDGFR) involved in fibrotic pathways.
  • Sources: BioPharma Dive, Endpoints News, Fierce Biotech
